title: No Offline Time Passage
description: Time/Weather stop passing when no players are Online/In Survival.
body:
# Summary

### No Offline Time Passage 
Are you tired of the days passing on servers when no one is online? Do you want the day counter to stay at 0 until you finish building spawn?

If so this is the perfect Datapack/Mod for you!

No Offline Time Passage or NOTP for short haults the passage of time and weather when there are no players in survival mode online.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0gqHZA2PaAg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
